channel.title: loadbalancer on Samet Aylak
channel.description: Recent content in loadbalancer on Samet Aylak

item.title: Nginx Load Balancer
item.description: Hey, everyone! How’s it going? Today, We will setup Nginx with Load Balancer. First of all, We should set ubuntu virtual machine. I’m gonna use Vagrant for this step. vagrant init bento/ubuntu-18.04 vagrant up This commands will create a virtual machine and boot it for us. This may take a while if you have not ubuntu box. Then you can connect the virtual machine with vagrant ssh command. Now, we can install Nginx to our machine.
